---
title: "Calculate Indicators"
output: # html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# R Set-up

```{r}
# Clear workspace
rm(list = ls())

# Libraries 
library(terra)
library(here)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(aws.s3)

# Authenticate aws
source(here::here('aws_cred.R'))

# Base S3 location (GDAL-style path)
s3_base <- "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data"

dat.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "raw")
roi.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "studyarea")
dum.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "dummy")
ind.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "indicators")

```

# Data

## 0.1 Indicator Data

Load in the wrangled vector data for each indicator. 

```{r}
# Find matching GeoPackage files
objs <- get_bucket(
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  prefix = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data/indicators/"
)

gpkg_files <- paste0(
  "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/",
  sapply(objs, `[[`, "Key")
)

gpkg_files <- gpkg_files[grepl("\\.gpkg$", gpkg_files)]


indicator_tbl <- data.frame(
  file = gpkg_files,
  indicator_id = sub("^ind_(.*)\\.gpkg$", "\\1", basename(gpkg_files))
)

indicator_tbl$vector <- lapply(indicator_tbl$file, vect)


```


## 0.2 Dummy Data

```{r}
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "eccc_reclass_reproj_algn_binary.tif"))
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "gpw_reproj_algn_natseminat_noshrub_masked.tif"))
dum_fut <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "AAFC_LUTS_2020_5-classes.tif"))

# plot(dum_base)
# plot(dum_fut)
```

## 0.2 Eco-district Data
```{r}
# eco_dist$ECODISTRIC is ID column
eco_dist <-  vect(file.path(roi.dir, "national-ecological-framework-for-canada", "Ecodistricts",  "ecodistricts_clean_modelling-extent.shp"))

# plot(eco_dist)

# Census subdivision lookup table 
eco_dist_lut <- terra::values(eco_dist) |>
  dplyr::select(
    ECODISTRIC,
    ECOREGION_,
    ECOZONE_ID
  )

lut_csv <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")

write.csv(
  eco_dist_lut,
  lut_csv,
  row.names = FALSE
)

aws.s3::put_object(
  file   = lut_csv,
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  object = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/results/ecodistrict_lookup.csv"
)

```



# Calc indicators

```{r}
# ---- Progress logging setup ----

log_file <- here::here(
  "logs",
  paste0("indicator_progress_ecodist_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".log")
)

dir.create(dirname(log_file), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

log_msg <- function(msg) {
  timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", timestamp, msg),
      file = log_file,
      append = TRUE)
}

log_msg("Starting indicator calculation (per ecodistrict)")
log_msg(paste("Number of vectors:", nrow(indicator_tbl)))
log_msg(paste("Number of ecodistricts:", nrow(eco_dist)))
```

```{r}
# ---- Sanity checks ----
stopifnot(
  crs(dum_base) == crs(eco_dist),
  all(sapply(indicator_tbl$vector, function(v) crs(dum_base) == crs(v)))
  )


log_msg("CRS check passed for raster and vectors")

```

```{r}
# ---- Cache ecodistrict raster ----
tmp_dir <- "/home/sagemaker-user/WG_Biodiversity/tmp_data"
dir.create(tmp_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

eco_rast_file <- file.path(tmp_dir, "eco_dist_rast.tif")

if (file.exists(eco_rast_file)) {

  eco_rast <- rast(eco_rast_file)
  log_msg("Loaded cached ecodistrict raster")

} else {

  eco_rast <- rasterize(
    eco_dist,
    dum_base,
    field = "ECODISTRIC",
    background = NA
  )

  writeRaster(
    eco_rast,
    eco_rast_file,
    overwrite = TRUE
  )

  log_msg("Ecodistrict raster created and saved locally")
}

```



```{r}
terraOptions(cores = parallel::detectCores())
terraOptions(memfrac = 0.6, progress = 0)

# Progress bar (once, before loop)
pb <- txtProgressBar(
  min = 0,
  max = nrow(indicator_tbl),
  style = 3
)

results <- vector("list", nrow(indicator_tbl))


for (i in seq_len(nrow(indicator_tbl))) {
  id <- indicator_tbl$indicator_id[i]
  v  <- indicator_tbl$vector[[i]]
  
  t0 <- Sys.time()
  log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %d: started", i))

  res <- tryCatch({

    # Dissolve indicator once
    v_one <- aggregate(v)

    # Rasterize indicator geometry to dummy raster grid
    ind_mask <- rasterize(
      v_one,
      dum_base,
      field = 1,
      background = NA
      )

    # Mask ecodistrict raster to indicator footprint
    dum_masked <- mask(dum_base, ind_mask)
    eco_masked <- mask(eco_rast, ind_mask)   
    
    # Zonal sum (single raster pass)
    
    zonal_tbl <- as.data.frame(
      zonal(dum_masked, eco_masked, fun = "sum", na.rm = TRUE)
    )
    
    colnames(zonal_tbl) <- c("ECODISTRIC", "pixel_ones")
    
    zonal_tbl$pixel_ones <- ifelse(
      is.finite(zonal_tbl$pixel_ones),
      zonal_tbl$pixel_ones,
      0
    )

    zonal_tbl <- zonal_tbl[!is.na(zonal_tbl$ECODISTRIC), ]

    
    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: %d ecodistricts with data; total pixels = %s",
      i,
      nrow(zonal_tbl),
      format(sum(zonal_tbl$pixel_ones, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ",")
    ))
    
    
    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: pixel range = [%s, %s]",
      i,
      min(zonal_tbl$pixel_ones, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(zonal_tbl$pixel_ones, na.rm = TRUE)
    ))


    zonal_tbl$indicator_id <- indicator_tbl$indicator_id[i]
    zonal_tbl

  }, error = function(e) {

    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: ERROR - %s",
      i, e$message
    ))

    NULL
  })

  results[[i]] <- res

  # Update progress bar
  setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)

  log_msg(sprintf(
    "Indicator %d: finished in %0.2f minutes",
    i,
    as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units = "mins"))
  ))
}

close(pb)

log_msg("Tabular indicator calculation completed")
```

```{r}
indicators_ecodistrict_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(results)
log_msg(sprintf(
  "Final table created: %d rows, %d indicators",
  nrow(indicators_ecodistrict_df),
  length(unique(indicators_ecodistrict_df$indicator_id))
))
```

```{r}
# Local temp CSV
tmp_csv <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")

write.csv(
  indicators_ecodistrict_df,
  tmp_csv,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Upload to S3
aws.s3::put_object(
  file   = tmp_csv,
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  object = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/results/indicators_ecodistrict_pixel_counts2.csv"
)

log_msg("Saved indicators_ecodistrict_pixel_counts.csv to S3")
```
